tournament.name: Eternal Mania II - European Legacy Masters

decks.notes: The focus of this deck is to quickly disrupt the opponent's game plan with a combination of disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, while also applying pressure with efficient creatures like Brazen Borrower and Murktide Regent. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and Wasteland, while using card draw spells like Brainstorm and Ponder to find key cards. The inclusion of Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and Mishra's Bauble offers additional card selection. Overall, the deck seeks to maintain tempo and apply early pressure to secure a win.

The deck focuses on using cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and The Fantasticar to generate mana quickly and efficiently in order to cast Doomsday and set up a winning Thassa's Oracle win condition. With protection from counterspells like Force of Will and Daze, as well as disruption from cards like Duress and Thoughtseize, the deck aims to assemble its combo pieces and win the game in a rapid and decisive fashion. The deck also includes card selection tools like Brainstorm and Ponder to help find the necessary pieces for the combo.

This deck focuses on utilizing the synergy between Goblin Engineer, Emry, Lurker of the Loch, and Goblin Welder to recur artifacts from the graveyard, constantly generating value and setting up powerful combos. The deck also includes cards like Pinnacle Emissary and Loki, God of Mischief to disrupt the opponent's game plan while Phyrexian Dragon Engine can act as a finisher. Urza's Saga provides additional value by fetching key artifacts, creating a versatile strategy that can adapt to different matchups and outvalue opponents in the long run.

The deck focuses on using lands as a resource to control the game, utilizing cards like Crop Rotation, Life from the Loam, and Exploration to ramp up mana production and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to assemble the Dark Depths-Thespian's Stage combo to create a powerful 20/20 Marit Lage token while also utilizing disruptive spells like Grafdigger's Cage and Boseiju, Who Endures to control the opponent's plays. The deck also includes various utility lands like Bojuka Bog and Maze of Ith to further enhance its control capabilities.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and powerful spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent and deal massive amounts of damage. It includes a mix of creatures with strong abilities, removal spells to deal with threats, and land destruction to disrupt opponent's plans. The deck aims to establish board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game, utilizing a mix of creature abilities and combat tricks to ensure victory.

This deck focuses on aggressively deploying Eldrazi creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The key strategy involves using Chalice of the Void to disrupt the opponent's spells, while ramping up mana with cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thorn of Amethyst and Thought-Knot Seer to further disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a combination of powerful Eldrazi creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on utilizing Goblin Engineer and Goblin Welder to constantly manipulate artifacts in order to create powerful combos and control the game. By leveraging cards such as Urza's Saga, The Filigree Sylex, and various artifact creatures, the deck seeks to generate value and overwhelm opponents with its synergies. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Lightning Bolt and Ensnaring Bridge provides additional versatility and disruption against opposing strategies. The deck aims to establish board presence and outmaneuver opponents through its intricate interactions and efficient use of resources.

The key concept of this UWx Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage engines. The deck focuses on trading resources efficiently, using powerful planeswalkers like Tamiyo and Phelia to generate card advantage and maintain control of the game. It also incorporates some disruptive creatures like Kaito and Orcish Bowmasters to further disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of removal, counterspells, and powerful threats, this deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver its opponents in a grindy game of attrition.

The main focus of this deck is to establish control over the game through using powerful creatures like Atraxa and Craterhoof Behemoth, while utilizing cards like Endurance, Thoughtseize, and Natural Order to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also heavily relies on mana acceleration provided by cards like Gaea's Cradle and Noble Hierarch to quickly ramp up and overwhelm the opponent. In addition, the deck includes various utility cards like Collector Ouphe and Sylvan Safekeeper to deal with specific threats. Overall, the deck aims to establish board presence and control the game until it can secure a win with its powerful creatures.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient threats. The deck utilizes cards like Thoughtseize, Daze, and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also deploying threats like Brazen Borrower, Murktide Regent, and Nethergoyf to close out the game quickly. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps draw cards and provide additional value, while cards like Fatal Push and Flow State help control the board. The deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent through a combination of disruption and aggression.

The deck focuses on maintaining control of the game through counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It uses various cards to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect its own threats. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent with efficient card draw and creature removal while establishing a solid board presence. It also utilizes a mix of creatures with disruptive abilities to further control the game and create advantage. The mana base is designed to support the deck's multicolor requirements and ensure consistent access to the necessary resources.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing lands effectively. By using cards such as Life from the Loam, Exploration, and Urza's Saga, the deck aims to ramp up its mana production and land presence. This allows the player to disrupt their opponent's strategy with cards like Wasteland and Ghost Quarter while setting up powerful combinations like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Grafdigger's Cage and Pithing Needle to further control the game and outvalue the opponent.

This deck focuses on quickly putting pressure on the opponent by deploying efficient creatures and disrupting their game plan with removal spells and land destruction. The key strategy revolves around using creatures like Knight of the Reliquary and Noble Hierarch to ramp up and beat down opponents, while also utilizing cards like Endurance and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt their strategies. By efficiently managing resources and leveraging the flexibility of Green Sun's Zenith, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield using various reanimation spells. By utilizing cards like Faithless Looting and Thoughtseize to discard cards and then casting Reanimate or Animate Dead, the deck can cheat out big threats like Griselbrand, Archon of Cruelty, and Atraxa, Grand Unifier early in the game. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with high-powered creatures and disrupt their game plan with cards like Cabal Therapy and Unmask.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back into play for a game-winning surge of aggression. Utilizing efficient card selection and countermagic, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' strategies while setting up its own powerful combos. The key is to carefully manage resources and timing to maximize the impact of reanimation spells and overwhelm the opponent with hard-hitting creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Atraxa, Grand Unifier. By carefully navigating the graveyard and utilizing various synergies, the deck looks to outpace and outmaneuver opponents for a swift victory.

This deck revolves around quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Atraxa, Grand Unifier, then using reanimation spells like Reanimate and Animate Dead to bring them back onto the battlefield for a game-winning combo. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo, allowing the player to quickly overwhelm their opponent with massive creatures. The mana base is optimized for consistently casting the key spells needed to execute the combo efficiently.
